description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a white exterior and a long neck, reminiscent of a wine or specialty beverage bottle. The front features a detailed label with the text 'SOK MALINOWY' and an illustration of raspberries, suggesting it contains raspberry juice. Additional branding and decorative elements, such as a brown band with text and a woven basket motif at the base, are visible. The bottle appears to be made of glass, with a smooth, glossy finish and a screw cap closure. The back and sides are mostly plain white, with only small portions of the label wrapping around. No visible liquid is present inside, and the bottle shows no signs of damage or wear.
description: A tall, white glass bottle with a raspberry-themed label and a screw cap, featuring decorative branding and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main raspberry label, brown branding band, and woven basket motif at the base.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain white back of the bottle with minimal label visible.
description_view_2: Back-right view with a partial glimpse of the brown branding band and label edge.
description_view_3: Front view clearly showing the main label, branding band, and decorative base.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'SOK MALINOWY', raspberry illustration, brown band with white text near the neck, and woven basket motif at the base. All branding is in a classic, decorative style.
